wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q1378446 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Liste europäischer Leuchttürme to de:Liste von Leuchttürmen in Europa
Фар Екрене - an affected OSM element that may be improved
? -> de:Liste von Leuchttürmen in Europa
Liste von Leuchttürmen in Europa
